params.name: Olympic Torch
params.description:
On 20 July 1936, the first modern Olympic torch relay took place in Berlin Olympic Games.
Constantine's torch, the first torch used in the modern Olympic Games, is named after its user, Greek athlete Constantine. The flame of the torch was collected from the ancient Olympic temple in Olympia, and then passed through the hands of Constantine, first in the territory of Greek, and finally to Berlin. On the opening day, the flame lit the main cauldron, which became a highlight of the opening cere …
